message:
feat: add complex/string/datetime dtypes, noncentral distributions, and ndarray layout methods

- fnp-dtype: Add Complex64, Complex128, Str, DateTime64, TimeDelta64 variants
  with full promotion, casting, and parsing rules (is_complex, is_numeric)
- fnp-random: Add noncentral_chisquare and noncentral_f distributions with
  extracted sample_poisson_single helper
- fnp-ufunc: Extend astype and array_repr to handle new dtype variants
- fnp-ndarray: Add ndim, is_contiguous, is_fortran_contiguous layout methods
- fnp-conformance: Update adversarial fixture from complex128 to complex256
  (complex128 is now a supported dtype), regenerate RaptorQ sidecars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
